title: 比較級 + than...（不等比較）

formulas.zh: 單音節形容詞/副詞加-er表比較級

formulas.formula: more + adj./adv. + than + 比較對象
formulas.zh: 多音節形容詞/副詞用more表比較級

explanation: 比較級用於兩者之間的對比。單音節形容詞通常加-er（如tall→taller），多音節形容詞用more（如expensive→more expensive）。部分形容詞兼具兩種用法（如common→commoner/more common）。須注意不規則比較級（good→better, bad→worse, far→farther/further）。比較對象必須詞性相同、邏輯可比，避免比較不同類別的事物。常用than引導被比較對象。

examples.eng: This smartphone is more expensive than that one, but it has better features.
examples.chi: 這支手機比那支貴，但它的功能更好。

examples.eng: She runs faster than her brother and is more determined to win the race.
examples.chi: 她比哥哥跑得快，而且更決心贏得比賽。

examples.eng: The weather in summer is hotter and more humid than in spring.
examples.chi: 夏天的天氣比春天更熱、更潮濕。

examples.eng: This book is less interesting than the one I read last week.
examples.chi: 這本書沒有我上週讀的那本有趣。

extension.tip: 判斷用-er或more的關鍵：數音節。one-syllable用-er（big→bigger），three or more用more（beautiful→more beautiful）。two-syllable有特例：happy→happier，clever→cleverer。另當形容詞修飾比較級時，使用even/much/far加強（much better）。

examples.test: 我的房間比你的大 / My room is bigger than yours.
這個計畫比那個更重要 / This project is more important than that one.
他跑得快得多 / He runs much faster than before.
examples.result: → 用much修飾faster加強比較級語氣

extension.note: 單音節加-er，多音節用more；遇到不規則詞直接換詞（good→better）；若無法判斷音節數，用more較保險。

parts: that one, so I decided to buy it.
exercises.sentence: This laptop is more powerful than that one, so I decided to buy it.
exercises.translation: 這台筆電比那台強大，所以我決定買它。

parts: her sister in sports, and also
exercises.sentence: She is more talented than her sister in sports, and also more diligent at studying.
exercises.translation: 她在運動上比她妹妹更有天賦，在讀書上也更勤奮。

parts: the new one, but it has more character.
exercises.sentence: The old house is smaller than the new one, but it has more character.
exercises.translation: 舊房子比新房子小，但它更有特色。

parts: his friend, and his pronunciation is
exercises.sentence: He speaks English more fluently than his friend, and his pronunciation is better.
exercises.translation: 他比他的朋友說得更流暢，他的發音也更好。
